science.title: Scientists just created exotic new forms of matter that shouldn’t exist

science.title: Male Birth Control Breakthrough: Scientists Find Way To Turn Sperm Production Off and Back On
science.summary: Cornell University scientists have made significant progress toward what many consider the holy grail of male birth control: a safe, long-acting, fully effective, and nonhormonal contraceptive that can be reversed. science.title: MIT scientists finally reveal the hidden structure of a mysterious high-tech material
science.summary: For decades, relaxor ferroelectrics have powered everything from medical ultrasounds to sonar systems, yet their inner atomic structure remained a mystery—until now. Researchers have finally mapped their three-dimensional structure in unprecedented detail, uncovering hidden patterns in how electric charges are arranged

science.title: Quantum Breakthrough Turns Simple Forces Into Powerful New Interactions

science.title: Scientists make stunning discovery that could change our understanding of the Universe
science.summary: Scientists may have uncovered a surprising secret behind why life exists at all. tech.title: Engineers at NASA's Jet Propulsion Lab make a breakthrough in rotor technology
tech.summary: Testing shows rotor blades won't disintegrate when they spin at supersonic speed.

tech.title: Porsche shutters e-bike, battery, software subsidiaries as part of company overhaul
tech.summary: More than 500 people will be affected by the closures. “We must refocus on our core business,” Porsche CEO and executive chair Michael Leiters said in a statement. "This is the indispensable foundation for a successful strategic realignment. This forces us to make painful cuts — including our subsidiaries."

medicine.title: A common constipation drug shows surprising power to protect kidneys
medicine.summary: A common constipation drug may have unexpectedly unlocked a new way to slow chronic kidney disease — a condition that affects millions and often leads to dialysis. medicine.title: Colon cancer breakthrough keeps patients cancer-free for nearly 3 years
medicine.summary: A short burst of immunotherapy before surgery is delivering surprisingly powerful results for a specific type of colorectal cancer. medicine.title: New treatment cuts bad cholesterol by nearly 50% without statins
medicine.summary: A new breakthrough could change how high cholesterol is treated, offering a powerful alternative to traditional drugs. Researchers have developed tiny DNA-based molecules that shut down PCSK9—a key protein that keeps “bad” LDL cholesterol circulating in the blood. medicine.title: Allergy treatment shifts toward precision medicine with tailored immunotherapy, new guidance shows

medicine.title: Why Americans die sooner: Disease and drugs widen US mortality gap
medicine.summary: Between 1999 and 2022, the US had substantially higher death rates than other wealthy nations, largely due to cardiovascular disease, metabolic diseases (including diabetes), Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, and drug and alcohol complications. mathematics.title: In Math, Rigor Is Vital. But Are Digitized Proofs Taking It Too Far?

astronomy.title: How Massive Star Clusters Shape Galaxy Evolution

astronomy.summary: The Paranal solar ESPRESSO Telescope (PoET), installed at the European Southern Observatory's (ESO's) Paranal site in Chile, has made its first observations. astronomy.title: How an exoplanet odd couple survived by traveling in from the cold together
astronomy.summary: By probing the atmosphere of a mini-Neptune exoplanet, the James Webb Space Telescope has found that it formed much farther from its star than it is today, possibly explaining the origin of many other mini-Neptunes in the process.

astronomy.title: This Week's Sky at a Glance, May 8 – 17
astronomy.summary: Jupiter, shining high the western dusk, inches down day toward brighter Venus. Venus, meanwhile, creeps toward the horntip stars of Taurus and stands between them on May 13th. The post This Week's Sky at a Glance, May 8 – 17 appeared first on Sky & Telescope.

astronomy.title: Nearby Super-Earth Has No Atmosphere and a Dark, Moon-like Surface
astronomy.summary: The James Webb Space Telescope has observed the surface of a bare rocky exoplanet, revealing old, dark rock akin to that on our Moon. The post Nearby Super-Earth Has No Atmosphere and a Dark, Moon-like Surface appeared first on Sky & Telescope.

ai.title: AgentTrust: Runtime Safety Evaluation and Interception for AI Agent Tool Use
ai.summary: arXiv:2605.04785v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modern AI agents execute real-world side effects through tool calls such as file operations, shell commands, HTTP requests, and database queries. A single unsafe action, including accidental deletion, credential exposure, or data exfiltration, can cause irreversible harm.
